recommendations.title: Girlfight
recommendations.overview: Diana Guzman, a troubled Brooklyn teenager, decides to channel her aggression by training to become a boxer, all while keeping it a secret from her father.

recommendations.title: Destroyer
recommendations.overview: When Erin Bell was a young cop, she was given an undercover assignment that ended badly and destroyed her life. Years later, she must face her demons in order to make peace with her past.

recommendations.title: The Invitation
recommendations.overview: Will and his new girlfriend Kira are invited to a dinner with old friends at the house of Will’s ex Eden and her new partner David. Although the evening appears to be relaxed, Will soon gets a creeping suspicion that their charming host David is up t

recommendations.title: Jennifer's Body
recommendations.overview: Jennifer, a gorgeous, seductive cheerleader takes evil to a whole new level after she's possessed by a sinister demon. Now it's up to her best friend to stop Jennifer's reign of terror before it's too late.

recommendations.title: XX
recommendations.overview: This all-female horror anthology features four dark tales from four fiercely talented women.
recommendations.director: Roxanne Benjamin, St. Vincent, Jovanka Vuckovic, Karyn Kusama

recommendations.title: Twelve Monkeys
recommendations.overview: In the year 2035, convict James Cole reluctantly volunteers to be sent back in time to discover the origin of a deadly virus that wiped out nearly all of the earth's population and forced the survivors into underground communities. But when Cole is m

recommendations.title: Children of Men
recommendations.overview: In 2027, in a chaotic world in which humans can no longer procreate, a former activist agrees to help transport a miraculously pregnant woman to a sanctuary at sea, where her child's birth may help scientists save the future of humankind.

recommendations.title: Infinity Chamber
recommendations.overview: A man trapped in an automated prison must outsmart a computer in order to escape and try and find his way back to the outside world that may already be wiped out.

recommendations.title: Spider in the Web
recommendations.overview: A young operative is sent on a mission to follow an older agent who's behavior has come into question.

recommendations.title: Sexmission
recommendations.overview: Two scientists are chosen as guinea pigs for a time experiment: they are placed in hibernation and should be brought back to life after three years. In the meantime, however, World War III breaks out and life has been wiped off the surface of Earth.
